mapper.select: SELECT * FROM goods_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goods_id = #{goodsId}
SELECT * FROM goods_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND goods_id = #{goodsId}
SELECT g.* FROM goods_favorite f JOIN goods g ON f.goods_id = g.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.is_deleted = 0 AND g.is_deleted = 0
